titleStmt.title: SII 31.117: original edition by C. A. Padmanabha Sastri and T. S. Ravishankar
No. 117. (A.R. No. B 296 of 1938.) VELUDURTI, KAMALAPURAM TALUK, CUDDAPAH DISTRICT.

summary.p: A slab set up in front of the Chennakēśvarasvāmi temple.
This record is dated Śaka 1479, Naḷa, Phālguṇa śu. 15, Corresponding to February 13, Saturday, 1557 A.D. (current).

It states that Vōbaḷarāju, son of Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Rēmaṭikoṇḍa Vobularāju of Sōma-vaṁśa and Ātrēyagōtra installed an image of Ēgu-Perumāḷu. He bought this image for 12 varahās and performing offermed and worship. He had also constructed the prakāra wall and a flower garden to the temple of Chennarāya, Yēgu (yajna) Perumāl and Lakshmi-dēvamma.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīmatē rāmānujāyanamaḥ . śrīmatusva
stiśrījayābhyudaya śālivāhana śakavarurṣa
ṁbulu 1479 Agunēṭi naḷa saṁvatsara phālguṇaśu
14lu śrīmaṁnma mahārājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara
śrīvīrapratāpa sada(dā)si(śi)parāyamahārāyalu vija(dyā)nagarama
ṁdu ratnasiṁhāsanārūḍhulayi pṛti(dhvī)yaṁdurājyamu sēyucuṁḍa
ṁgānu sōmavamuśāṁ (sōmavaṁśaṁ) A(Ā)trēyagōtrapavitrulaIna (laina)
śrīmaṁn mahāmaṁḍalēśvararēmaṭi koṁḍavobuḷrā
jugārikomāruḍu vōbuḷrājugāru veluduriti ceṁ
nnakēśava perumāḷaku yeggu perumāḷanu paṁḍaiṁḍu varahalu yajña ani caduravalenu
śāva kānike sēsi samarpiṁci tecci pratiṣṭha sēyiṁcenu . dēvuni
prākāramu kōṭapeṭiṁcenu . dēvunki puṣpa(ṣpā)la tōṁṭakrayamu .
kōni ceṁnnarāyaniṁvegu perumāḷakuṁ lakṣmidēvamakuṁnu sāyajña ani caduravalenu
ṣṭhāṁgadaṁḍaṁpeṭṭi samarpiṁcenu . maṁgaḷamā śrīśrī
jēyunu .
Digital edition of SII 31.117 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
